"[63] 76-S3 NOTIFY S4 / NOTIFY MEDIA -- FOR CLOSURE AT EB JEO FRONTAGE [Shared]"
"[61] 76-S3 SPOKE W/ 302 -- START SIG ALERT / COUPLE HRS / ADVS CT TO ACTIVATE CMS SIGN -- ADVS THE EB LNS ARE CLOSED JEO OF THE VALLEY [Shared]"
"[56] A76-302 SMOKE IS BLOWING THE NB LNS / BUS IS OCASSIONALLY POPPING / 76-301 ENRT FRM THE OFC [Shared]"
"[54] A76-302 NEG TRFC CAN NOT SAFELY PASS ON THE EB SIDE -- DEBRIS FLYS INTO THE LNS [Shared]"
"[53] CALFIRE LL -- CPYS BUS FIRE POPPING [Shared]"
"[43] [Notification] [CHP]-PER S3 // FD IS GOING TO HAVE TO GET THROUGH IF ALL TRFC IS STOPPED FD WILL BE STUCK BEHIND THE BACK UP [Shared]"
"[40] A76-302 BUS IS FULLY ENGULF / REQ ADDITONAL UNIT TO CLOSE EB LNS/ 76-S3 ENRT [Shared]"
"[23] PER DUP SEV PRTYS STANDING OO VEH CLOSE TO LNS [Shared]"

details.IncidentDetail: "[2] ELDERLY MALE OO VEH -- PACING BACK AND FORTH "
